result.stdout:
Description:
  Database Schema Inspector - Generate POCOs from database schemas using pengdows.crud framework

Usage:
  pengdows.poco.mint.cli [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help                                                                                                                                                           Show help and usage information
  --version                                                                                                                                                                Show version information
  -c, --connection-string (REQUIRED)                                                                                                                                       Database connection string
  -p, --provider <AuroraMySql|AuroraPostgreSql|CockroachDb|DuckDB|Firebird|MariaDb|MySql|Oracle|PostgreSql|Snowflake|Sqlite|SqlServer|TiDb|Unknown|YugabyteDb> (REQUIRED)  Database provider
  -o, --output                                                                                                                                                             Output directory path [default: ./Generated]
  -n, --namespace                                                                                                                                                          Namespace for generated classes [default: Generated.Entities]
  -s, --schemas                                                                                                                                                            Specific schemas to include (default: all)
  --include-views                                                                                                                                                          Include database views
  -t, --tables                                                                                                                                                             Specific tables to include (default: all)
  -f, --config                                                                                                                                                             Configuration file path (optional)
  -y, --yes                                                                                                                                                                Skip confirmation warnings
